description: Maps source fields that define bounded time intervals to the TimePeriod concept. Each rule identifies a start field and an end field, corresponding to the ontology properties startDate and endDate.

rules.rationale: registered_date marks when the person became registered as a job seeker, while deregistered_date marks when that registration ended. In active cases, deregistered_date may be empty.
decision_from and decision_to define the validity period of the AF benefit type decision.
applied_from and applied_to define the period for which study support was applied. CSN stores these dates in YYYYMMDD format.
start_week and end_week define the approved CSN study period. CSN stores approved periods as ISO year-week values in YYYYWW format.
period_start_week and period_end_week define the grant decision period and are derived from the approved CSN period.
opened_date marks the beginning of the FK case. The synthetic dataset does not include a corresponding closed_date field, so the end date is unavailable.
decision_from and decision_to define the FK period benefit decision interval.
